title: Markdoc tag registry
description: Reserved Markdoc tag names and their attribute schemas. `docs lint` enforces open/close pairing, required/allowed attribute keys, and (for req/acceptance/milestone) frontmatter id existence and body-level id uniqueness against this registry.

decision.purpose: ADR's Decision section body (one per ADR).

req.purpose: Spec requirement body (functional or non-functional). id must match frontmatter.functional_requirements[].id or non_functional_requirements[].id.

acceptance.purpose: Spec acceptance criterion body. id must match frontmatter acceptance[].id.

milestone.purpose: Plan milestone body. id must match frontmatter milestones[].id.

task-ref.purpose: Inline reference to a task by id.

adr-ref.purpose: Inline reference to an ADR by id.

snippet.purpose: Embed code from a source path. Phase 2C renderer expands; lint leaves as-is.

transition.purpose: Status transition journal entry. Appended to body by `docs transition <id> <to> --reason '...'`.
